name: duckrun
description: duckrun — a dbt adapter that runs SQL in DuckDB and materializes to Delta Lake. Skills for building dbt projects on it.

plugins.name: duckrun-projects
plugins.description: How to build, configure, run, and debug dbt projects on the duckrun adapter (DuckDB executes model SQL, delta-rs writes Delta tables) — local or on S3/GCS/ADLS/OneLake (Microsoft Fabric).
